title: SMBMap Share ACL and Recursive Listing
description: This runbook operationalizes SMBMap Share ACL and Recursive Listing using #smbmap . It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments. Maps SMB permissions and recursively enumerates sensitive domain shares.
shortDescription: SMBMap Share ACL and Recursive Listing

metadata.descriptionHtml:
This runbook operationalizes SMBMap Share ACL and Recursive Listing using #smbmap. It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments.

Maps SMB permissions and recursively enumerates sensitive domain shares.

  1. Prepare scope and access: validate target reachability and select low-noise execution order.
  2. Execute core workflow: run the command chain to produce actionable security outcomes.
  3. Validate and operationalize output: confirm results, capture artifacts, and prepare follow-on actions.
  • Tool Location/Source: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Active Directory Enumeration and Attacks.md:85; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Active Directory Enumeration and Attacks.md:86.
  • Attack pre-requisite: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 445.
  • What attacker gain: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
  • Detection/Defense opsec: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.

Core Commands:

smbmap -u forend -p Klmcargo2 -d INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL -H 172.16.5.5
smbmap -u forend -p Klmcargo2 -d INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL -H 172.16.5.5 -R SYSVOL --dir-only
smbmap -u DoesNotExists -H IP
metadata.commandsBlock:
smbmap -u forend -p Klmcargo2 -d INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL -H 172.16.5.5
smbmap -u forend -p Klmcargo2 -d INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL -H 172.16.5.5 -R SYSVOL --dir-only
smbmap -u DoesNotExists -H IP
